banner.headline: Where Exceptional Dining Meets Unforgettable Celebrations
banner.subheading: Experience fine dining, grand celebrations, and premium entertainment—all in one destination.

contact.address: Aurum Luxury Estate, Golden Mile Road, Udaipur, Rajasthan - 313001
contact.workingHours: Restaurant: 11:00 AM - 11:30 PM | Lawn: Open 24 Hours | Theatre: 10:00 AM - 11:00 PM

testimonials.name: Maharaj Kumar Singh
testimonials.quote: Aurum Estate hosted our family wedding on the Banquet Lawn. The coordination, custom catering, and majestic light designs for 4,500 guests was absolutely flawless. It was a royal fairy tale.

testimonials.name: Chef Marco Pierre
testimonials.quote: The fine dining restaurant at Aurum is a masterclass in gastronomy. Their blend of traditional Mewari flavours with French culinary techniques is exceptionally rare and delicious.

testimonials.name: Ananya Singhania
testimonials.quote: The private theatre is a revelation. Gold class recliners, gourmet dining delivered straight to your seat, and top-tier acoustics. Watching a cinema here feels like a premium event in itself.

menu.name: Truffle Scented Wild Mushroom Soup
menu.description: Slow-simmered forest mushrooms, shaved black winter truffles, white truffle oil, and garlic herb crostini.

menu.name: Aurum Gold-Leaf Paneer Tikka
menu.description: Premium cottage cheese blocks marinated in organic Kashmiri red chilies and hung curd, smoked in a traditional tandoor, finished with edible 24K gold leaf.

menu.name: Royal Mewari Lal Maas
menu.description: Udaipur's signature slow-cooked tender lamb in a fiery Mathania chili gravy, infused with clove smoke, served with clay-oven baked butter naan.

menu.name: Saffron Cardamom Pistachio Kulfi
menu.description: Slow-reduced milk ice cream infused with premium Kashmiri saffron filaments, green cardamom, roasted pistachios, and silver leaf foil.

menu.name: Elixir Mocktail Royale
menu.description: A luxury blend of fresh muddled berries, cold-pressed pineapple, fresh lime, edible rose gold glitter, charged with premium tonic water.

offers.title: Royal Gastronomic Journey
offers.description: Get a complimentary glass of premium sparkling mocktail and 15% off your total bill when reserving online.

offers.title: Grand Banquet Package
offers.description: Book the Banquet Lawn for over 2,000 guests and receive complimentary event management, a luxury welcome stage, and live instrumentation.

events.title: Grand Weddings & Receptions
events.description: With a capacity of 5,200 guests, our banquet lawn transforms into a magical palace setup, complete with stellar staging, premium catering, and automated royal lighting arrays.

events.title: Corporate Gala Dinners
events.description: Perfect location for national conferences, product launches, and award nights. Full power backups, sound arrays, VIP lounges, and parking for 1,200 vehicles.

events.title: Festivals & Large Concerts
events.description: The largest outdoor venue in the city, fully equipped to host grand music festivals, cultural events, dandiya nights, and large public gatherings securely.
